tagline: Sri Lanka's cognitive training platform for IQ development

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You need to log in to view this page.

emptyState.defaultDescription: This will fill in as you use HelaIQ.

errorState.defaultDescription: Check your connection and try again.

footer.project: Final Year Project · University of Kelaniya
footer.poweredBy: AI feedback powered by Google Gemini

landing.badge: Built for Sri Lankan students & exam candidates
landing.heroTagline: Train smarter. Think faster. Prepare with purpose.

assess.title: Take the placement test
assess.description: A short adaptive test finds your starting level across five cognitive areas.

practice.title: Practice every day
practice.description: Daily sessions adjust to your pace and focus on your weaker areas.

track.title: Track your readiness
track.description: See your progress, predicted exam readiness, and what to study next.

skillAreas.title: Five cognitive skill areas
skillAreas.description: Every question is tagged to one of these areas, so your progress is easy to follow.

adaptive.title: 5-level adaptive IQ engine
adaptive.description: A placement test measures your starting level across memory, logic, numbers, attention and pattern recognition, then adapts as you improve.

examPrep.title: Built for exam day
examPrep.description: Set your exam date, take full-length mock exams, and follow a study plan that adjusts as the date gets closer.

progress.title: Progress you can see
progress.description: Track your level history, category strengths and streaks on a single dashboard.

games.title: Practice through games
games.description: Short games keep memory, attention and reasoning sharp between full sessions.

explanations.title: Explained, not just marked
explanations.description: Every wrong answer gets a clear, friendly explanation so mistakes turn into understanding.

bilingual.title: Sinhala and English
bilingual.description: Use HelaIQ in whichever language you study best in.
